verses.1: Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD who serve by night in the house of the LORD!
verses.2: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary and bless the LORD!
verses.3: May the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth, bless you from Zion.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
